Uses of Interface
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun.graph.GraphNode

Packages that use GraphNode
Package
Description
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun
Interfaces used to make a host fun, which is a FunVal to perform action in Java code.
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun.graph
Provides the Execution Graph DSL, which is a convenient way to invoke Kink funs from Java actions or handlers.
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun.graph.impl
Implementations of the Execution Graph DSL.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.intrinsicsupport
Provides funs used from intrinsics.

    Methods in org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun with parameters of type GraphNode
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CallFlowToOn
    HostContext.call(GraphNode graph)
    Returns a call flow to evaluate the graph.

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    CallGraphNodeToArgs
    GraphNode which supports call flow, to bind args.
    interface 
    CallGraphNodeToRecv
    GraphNode which supports call flow, to bind a recv.

    Method
    Description
    GraphNode
    CallGraphNodeToArgs.args(GraphNode... args)
    Binds the args to the call.
    GraphNode
    GraphFacade.format(String template, GraphNode... args)
    Convenient method to call the Kink method template.format(...args).
    GraphNode
    GraphFacade.of(Val val)
    Returns a graph node which emits the val.
    GraphNode
    GraphFacade.raiseFormat(String template, GraphNode... args)
    Convenient method to call raise(template.format(...args)).
